title: Preserve deterministic analytical integrity
description: Keep exact financial arithmetic, exhaustive evidence accounting, formula evaluation, ordering, and fingerprints reproducible across every supported report workflow.
target: 100% of repeated generations, retained generations, explanations, and Restatements with identical trusted As-of Instant, normalized requests, coherent source identities, and policy versions return semantically identical ordered content and fingerprints; 100% of requested windows, categories, metrics, and signal kinds are accounted for exactly once; zero floating-point financial calculations, silent omissions, reconciliation mismatches, or partial reports occur.
load_condition: Exact zero, positive, negative, refund-heavy, zero-plan, no-plan, not-started, overflow, maximum category, correction, retry, and policy-version cases across Generate, Retain, Restate, Get, and validation.
measurement: Golden conformance examples, input-order permutation tests, repeat-run semantic comparisons, property tests for exact sums and rational comparison, overflow and undefined-operation cases, and full report-accounting assertions.
rationale: Reproducibility and exact reconciliation are the trust basis for every retained or delivered insight.
